turns.query: Compare CO levels at roadside stations during peak (08:00) vs. off-peak (14:00) hours on January 22, 2025.
turns.actual_response:
On January 22, 2025, across 3 roadside stations with complete CO readings at both times:

- Mean CO at 08:00: 593.7 µg/m³
- Mean CO at 14:00: 639.7 µg/m³
- Difference: -46.0 µg/m³

CO was higher at 14:00 than at 08:00 by 46.0 µg/m³ on average.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

t0800 = "2025-01-22 08:00:00"
t1400 = "2025-01-22 14:00:00"

count_query = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS matching_readings
FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
JOIN air_quality_station s ON h.station_id = s.id
WHERE s.station_type = 'ROADSIDE'
  AND h.datetime IN (:t0800, :t1400)
  AND h.co IS NOT NULL
""")
matching_readings = int(pd.read_sql(count_query, engine, params={"t0800": t0800, "t1400": t1400})["matching_readings"].iloc[0])

agg_query = text("""
WITH per_station AS (
  SELECT
    h.station_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN h.datetime = :t0800 THEN h.co END) AS co_0800,
    MAX(CASE WHEN h.datetime = :t1400 THEN h.co END) AS co_1400
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
  JOIN air_quality_station s ON h.station_id = s.id
  WHERE s.station_type = 'ROADSIDE'
    AND h.datetime IN (:t0800, :t1400)
    AND h.co IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY h.station_id
),
paired AS (
  SELECT co_0800, co_1400
  FROM per_station
  WHERE co_0800 IS NOT NULL AND co_1400 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  AVG(co_0800)::float AS mean_co_0800,
  AVG(co_1400)::float AS mean_co_1400,
  (AVG(co_0800) - AVG(co_1400))::float AS co_difference,
  COUNT(*)::int AS n_roadside_stations
FROM paired
""")
res = pd.read_sql(agg_query, engine, params={"t0800": t0800, "t1400": t1400}).iloc[0]

mean_co_0800 = float(res["mean_co_0800"]) if pd.notna(res["mean_co_0800"]) else float("nan")
mean_co_1400 = float(res["mean_co_1400"]) if pd.notna(res["mean_co_1400"]) else float("nan")
co_difference = float(res["co_difference"]) if pd.notna(res["co_difference"]) else float("nan")
n_roadside_stations = int(res["n_roadside_stations"])

print({
    "matching_non_null_readings_checked": matching_readings,
    "n_roadside_stations_included": n_roadside_stations,
    "mean_co_0800": mean_co_0800,
    "mean_co_1400": mean_co_1400,
    "co_difference_0800_minus_1400": co_difference
})
